extract: Blast Burn (Japanese: ブラストバーン Blast Burn) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation III. It is TM153 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet and TM158 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. Along with Hydro Cannon and Frenzy Plant, Blast Burn is one of the ultimate moves. All fully evolved Fire-type first partner Pokémon can learn this move.
